name: debug
description: Structured debugging workflow for reproducing failures, narrowing root causes, and collecting evidence before changing code. Triggers: debug, debugging, root cause, reproduce, failing behavior, broken flow, investigate bug, triage failure, isolate issue, regression analysis.
codexLead: Recommended routing: `oabtw-codex debug "<failure or symptom>"` for read-only bug investigation, or `oabtw-codex test "<scope>"` when you specifically need test execution evidence.
